mapper.sql: instance_id as instanceId, instance_code as instanceCode, instance_name as instanceName, instance_label as instanceLabel, instance_status as instanceStatus, status_name as statusName, template_id as templateId, template_code as templateCode, template_name as templateName, template_version as templateVersion, aircraft_id as aircraftId, model_id as modelId, model_code as modelCode, model_name as modelName, tail_number as tailNumber, msn, aircraft_type as aircraftType, operational_status as operationalStatus, current_version_id as currentVersionId, current_version_no as currentVersionNo, current_version_label as currentVersionLabel, major_version_no as majorVersionNo, minor_version_no as minorVersionNo, version_level as versionLevel, version_reason as versionReason, generation_job_id as generationJobId, generation_job_code as generationJobCode, generation_job_status as generationJobStatus, generate_time as generateTime, page_count as pageCount, file_count as fileCount, data_record_count as dataRecordCount, document_entry_count as documentEntryCount, content_item_count as contentItemCount, pdf_file_name as pdfFileName, zip_file_name as zipFileName, created_by as createdBy, updated_by as updatedBy, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, published_at as publishedAt, archived_at as archivedAt
mapper.select: select count(1) as totalCount, coalesce(sum(case when instance_status = 'published' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as publishedCount, coalesce(sum(case when instance_status = 'ready' and coalesce(generation_job_status, '') <> 'failed' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as readyCount, coalesce(sum(case when instance_status = 'building' or generation_job_status in ('queued', 'running') then 1 else 0 end), 0) as buildingCount, coalesce(sum(case when generation_job_status = 'failed' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as failedCount, coalesce(sum(case when instance_status = 'archived' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as archivedCount, coalesce(sum(case when generate_time >= date_format(curdate(), '%Y-%m-01') then 1 else 0 end), 0) as monthNewCount

select
from t1_v_dossier_instance_manage where instance_id = #{instanceId} and deleted_at is null

select dv.id as versionId, dv.dossier_instance_id as instanceId, dv.template_id as templateId, dv.template_code as templateCode, dv.template_version as templateVersion, dv.version_no as versionNo, dv.version_label as versionLabel, dv.major_version_no as majorVersionNo, dv.minor_version_no as minorVersionNo, dv.version_level as versionLevel, dv.version_reason as versionReason, dv.is_current as isCurrent, dv.previous_version_id as previousVersionId, dv.generation_job_id as generationJobId, gj.job_code as generationJobCode, gj.job_status as generationJobStatus, gj.progress_percent as progressPercent, cast(dv.content_summary_json as char) as contentSummaryJson, cast(dv.generation_params_json as char) as generationParamsJson, cast(gj.result_summary_json as char) as resultSummaryJson, cast(gj.output_json as char) as outputJson, dv.change_summary as changeSummary, dv.created_by as createdBy, dv.created_at as createdAt, dv.published_at as publishedAt from t1_dossier_version dv left join t1_generation_job gj on gj.id = dv.generation_job_id where dv.dossier_instance_id = #{instanceId} order by dv.version_no desc

select id as jobId, job_code as jobCode, job_type as jobType, dossier_instance_id as instanceId, dossier_version_id as versionId, precheck_run_id as precheckRunId, job_status as jobStatus, current_stage as currentStage, progress_percent as progressPercent, source_system as sourceSystem, requested_by as requestedBy, started_at as startedAt, finished_at as finishedAt, error_message as errorMessage, cast(result_summary_json as char) as resultSummaryJson, cast(output_json as char) as outputJson, created_at as createdAt from t1_generation_job where dossier_instance_id = #{instanceId} order by created_at desc
mapper.update:
update t1_dossier_instance set status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = sysdate(6)
, published_at = sysdate(6), archived_at = null
, archived_at = sysdate(6)
where id = #{instanceId} and deleted_at is null
update t1_dossier_version dv inner join t1_dossier_instance di on di.current_version_id = dv.id set dv.published_at = sysdate(6) where di.id = #{instanceId}
mapper.insert: insert into t1_dossier_export_job (id, dossier_instance_id, dossier_version_id, generation_job_id, export_code, export_status, export_scope_json, export_params_json, requested_by, started_at, finished_at, created_at) values (#{exportJobId}, #{instanceId}, #{versionId}, #{generationJobId}, #{exportCode}, 'succeeded', #{exportScopeJson}, #{exportParamsJson}, #{requestedBy}, sysdate(6), sysdate(6), sysdate(6))

insert into t1_dossier_export_file (id, export_job_id, file_name, file_storage_key, file_format, mime_type, file_role, is_primary, file_size, page_count, file_hash, display_order, created_at) values (#{exportFileId}, #{exportJobId}, #{fileName}, #{fileStorageKey}, #{fileFormat}, #{mimeType}, #{fileRole}, #{isPrimary}, #{fileSize}, #{pageCount}, #{fileHash}, #{displayOrder}, sysdate(6))
